messages.content: ok kind of a funny coincidence, i keep seeing this one little cafe pop up everywhere this week

Oh that's fun, those little coincidences are kind of delightful! Like the universe is nudging you toward a cortado or something 😄

How has it been popping up - like people mentioning it, or you keep walking past it, or what?
like a friend mentioned it, then i walked past it, then it was in a show i was watching. three times

The classic "rule of three" coincidence! There's something about three times that really makes your brain go "okay WHAT is happening" 😄

It's funny how that works - like your friend probably mentioned dozens of places this week, and you walked past tons of cafes, but your brain latched onto *this one* because it was already primed to notice it. The frequency illusion or whatever it's called.

That said... are you going to go? Because honestly at this point it feels like you kind of have to, right? 😄 It's practically fate at this point, and it's almost like you'd be leaving a story unfinished if you didn't.
feels like the universe is nudging me to finally go check it out lol. i'm a little superstitious like that

Ha, nothing wrong with a little superstition! And honestly even if it's just your brain doing the frequency illusion thing, the end result is the same - you're curious about a cafe and now you have a fun reason to go check it out. That's a win either way!

Plus it's a pretty low stakes "sign from the universe" 😄 like, worst case you have a mediocre coffee. Best case you find a new favorite spot.

Do you have a good vibe about it, like does it look like your kind of place?
i know it's just my brain noticing the same thing more, but it's a fun excuse to try a new spot

Exactly! You get to have the fun of feeling like it's a little magical AND you know it's just your brain being funny. Best of both worlds honestly.

And trying new local spots is always worth it anyway - there's something nice about discovering a little cafe that becomes "your place." Especially if it's walkable from where you are.

Given it's already 9pm though, sounds like maybe a tomorrow plan? ☕
gonna go this weekend and get whatever their signature drink is. small adventures, you know

I love that attitude - small adventures are so underrated. You don't need a whole trip planned, sometimes it's just "I'm going to this cafe because the universe told me to" 😄

The signature drink order is the right move too, it's like the best way to get a feel for a place on a first visit.

Hope it's great! You'll have to report back on whether the universe steered you right 😄
